name: Pipeline Orchestrator
description: Graph-based workflow engine and tools for OpenClaw

pipelinesDir.description: Directory that contains pipeline *.json or *.yaml files

maxConcurrency.description: Maximum concurrent pipeline runs managed by the plugin

httpPath.description: Base path for the plugin's HTTP API (e.g. for dashboards or visualizations)

httpPort.description: Port for the HTTP API server when started by the plugin

authToken.description: Optional bearer token for API authentication (if set, Authorization: Bearer <token> required)

runsDir.description: Directory for run artifacts (run state, run.json per run). Relative paths resolve from the workspace. Default: .ripline/runs
